exploratory_cluster_mean_at_locked_cell_.note: Post-hoc descriptive analysis only; the threshold was not retuned at cluster level.

interpretation: All cell-level false positives arose from Dyskeratotic or Metaplastic morphology.
The five false-negative cells came from five different source clusters.
Errors indicate morphology overlap and domain-specific ambiguity; they are not evidence of HPV test performance.
